hooks.command: REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; if echo "$REMOTE" | grep -q 'github.com' && [ -n "$GITHUB_TOKEN" ]; then AUTHED=$(echo "$REMOTE" | sed "s|https://github.com|https://$GITHUB_TOKEN@github.com|"); git remote set-url origin "$AUTHED"; fi

BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$BRANCH" ] && exit 0; UNPUSHED=$(git log origin/$BRANCH..HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -l); [ "$UNPUSHED" -eq 0 ] && exit 0; git push -u origin "$BRANCH" 2>&1 || true
